description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/sample_tests.py to rename check_addition to test_addition, the only test-like function the checker flags as misnamed. All functions are now test_*-named, so check_test_names.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_test_names.py: 1 misnamed test function found — 'check_addition' (asserts add(2, 2) == 4 but does not start with 'test_', so pytest would never collect it). Renaming it to 'test_addition' in place, no behavior change. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_test_names.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
